name: com.bci-runtime.shm
description:
Cross-process shared-memory ring buffer with OS-event signaling for BCI neural-engine-to-unity communication.

Supports Windows (kernel32) and Linux (POSIX semaphores) backends.
Part of Project Synapse.

samples.description: Example scene with ShmNativeConsumer attached and wired to debug output.
Complete dashboard with scalp topography, scrolling 8-channel waveform, control panel (FPS, ACKs, commands), and CSV recording. Attach BCIDashboard.cs to any GameObject and hit Play.
Spatial audio renderer. Attach BCIAudioRenderer.cs to any GameObject; 8 AudioSources positioned in a 3D ring modulate volume by channel intensity.
